local_transform.review_gate: Replace or confirm with selected production working CRS before solver, cross-section, or Unreal coordinate authority.

promotion_gates: Confirm flow direction and station zero with guide review, DEM slope, official NHD flow direction, and gauge/release context.
Replace the preview equirectangular transform with the selected production working CRS before metric authoring.
Compare station samples against NAIP water edge, 3DEP terrain, access points, and rapid annotations.
Use left normals only as cross-section seeds until reviewed banks, shelves, side channels, and hazard polygons are attached.
